[协商中] 已获取Palantir财报数据，正在提取2022和2024年营收

</summary>


```python
import yfinance as yf

ticker = yf.Ticker("PLTR")
financials = ticker.financials

# 提取Total Revenue
revenue = financials.loc['Total Revenue']
print("All years revenue:")
print(revenue)

# 提取2022和2024年数据
revenue_2022 = revenue['2022-12-31']
revenue_2024 = revenue['2024-12-31']

print(f"\n2022 Revenue: ${revenue_2022/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"2024 Revenue: ${revenue_2024/1e9:.2f}B")

# 计算2年CAGR (2022-2024)
# CAGR = (End/Start)^(1/n) - 1, n=2 years
cagr = (revenue_2024 / revenue_2022) ** (1/2) - 1
print(f"\n2-Year CAGR (2022-2024): {cagr*100:.2f}%")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**
